_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 54: Authorised Representatives of Providers of GPAI Models
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
basis: EU AI Office guidance on third-country provider obligations
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 54 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Authorised Representative Appointment
requirements.requirement: A provider of a GPAI model established in a third country MUST appoint an authorised representative established in the Union before making the model available on the Union market.
requirements.rationale: Art. 54(1) mandates third-country providers appoint an EU-based authorised representative.
acceptable_implementations: Written mandate agreement with EU-established legal entity
Authorised representative contract specifying scope and duration
Formal appointment letter filed with relevant EU authorities

requirements.title: Written Mandate Scope
requirements.requirement: The authorised representative MUST have a written mandate specifying the tasks to be performed, including maintaining technical documentation and cooperating with competent authorities.
requirements.rationale: Art. 54(2) requires a written mandate defining the representative's responsibilities.
acceptable_implementations: Written mandate covering documentation maintenance and authority cooperation
Detailed mandate agreement with enumerated regulatory tasks
Legal instrument specifying representative powers aligned with Art. 54(2)

requirements.title: Documentation Retention
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST ensure that technical documentation is kept available for at least 10 years after the GPAI model has been placed on the market.
requirements.rationale: Art. 54 requires long-term documentation retention to enable regulatory oversight.
acceptable_implementations: 10-year document retention policy with secure archival storage
Version-controlled documentation repository with retention schedule
Third-party document management service with guaranteed retention period

scoring.partial: R01 met, R02 or R03 incomplete
